disclaimer: Not affiliated with Netflix. Scores are evidence-backed drafts with confidence intervals, not legal findings.

scores.rationale_short: Coercion via viral media is real; full episode fidelity needs credible hostage + failed state deepfake response. Gen-AI video is strong in 2026; political deepfake risk is documented.
High-quality synthetic media of public figures is achievable; detection remains an arms race.

Partial-analogue card: scores emphasize systems that capture some mechanisms without claiming full episode outcome fidelity. Coercion via viral media is real; full episode fidelity needs credible hostage + failed state deepfake response. Gen-AI video is strong in 2026; political deepfake risk is documented.
Core loop is largely deployed; episode aesthetics (bike farms, wall screens) are stylized but mechanism is present.
Media co-option of dissent is historical; algorithmic amplification accelerates it.
